title: Delhi court grants bail to I-PAC Director Vinesh Chandel after ED says no objection
description: A Delhi court on Thursday granted regular bail to Vinesh Chandel, director of political consultancy firm Indian Political Action Committee (IPAC), who was arrested by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) on April 13 in an alleged money laundering case. Additional Sessions Judge (ASJ) Amit Bansal of the Patiala House Court passed the order, noting that ED was not opposing Chandel's bail.
